title: Useful Resources for Researchers — D-RED Seminar Slides (Mehravaran)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2021-07-14 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Useful Resources for Researchers' presented by Shiva Mehravaran, MD, MSc. YouTube recording: https://youtu.be/iGsw3SK-J6k. Curated list of research-support tools, databases, and platforms available to MSU researchers.
